violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the rear kitchen entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024
Hot box door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024
The drain to the handwashing sink on the prep line was observed disconnected. Sink has been taken out of service until repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

The outside dumpster behind the kitchen is not covered, cardboard dumpster was observed overfilled. The dumpster near front entrance was missing doors, the front cardboard dumpster was uncovered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

The following in the kitchen area is in poor repair: -wall tiles over electrical panels (holes/missing) -wall tiles near rear handwashing sink (holes in wall). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2024

Soap was not available at the rear hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Staff spoke with custodial staff for supplies. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
The hand-washing sink in the rear of kitchen was lacking paper towels. Staff spoke with custodial staff for supplies. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025

The doors to the outside, located in the cafeteria and rear entrance to the kitchen, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024
Hot box door gaskets were observed in poor repair, with tears in the gaskets. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

The outside dumpster near rear kitchen entrance is not covered. The dumpster at the front lot of the building is missing doors. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

The following were observed in poor repair: -missing wall tiles over electrical panel -hole in tile where broken sink was removed -floor tiles near drain of hand washing sink (prep line). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2024

The doors to the outside, located in the cafeteria and rear entrance to kitchen, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024
Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are not stored inverted. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025
Hot box door gaskets were observed in poor repair, observed with tears. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

The following in the kitchen area are in poor repair: -wall tiles over electrical panel -holes in wall (where broken sink was removed). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2024

The door to the outside, located in the rear of the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC stated a new sweep was installed, but was installed too high to be effective. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024
Hot box door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

The following areas were observed in poor repair: -wall at hand sink (where broken sink was removed) has open holes in wall -wall tiles over electrical panels are cracked/missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2024

The door to the outside, (receiving door), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
Cans of food in dry storage room were observed in direct contact with rodent droppings. Food was voluntarily disposed of by PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings throughout dry storage room and in kitchen. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024

The door to the outside, (receiving door), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the bottom shelf of prep table was observed with an accumulation of apparent rodent droppings. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024

The floors underneath shelving in dry storage area have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2024

The fanguards in the walk-in cooler were observed with an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023
